title: Device Home Screen - End-of-Life Support After End Life Date
scenario: End of Life device shows red "i" icon on Device Home Screen with dismissible "Support for this device is no longer available" pop-up
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Locate a device that has passed its End of Life (EOL) date.
4. Observe the top right corner of the device card on the Home screen.
5. Tap the red "i" icon displayed in the top right corner.
6. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
7. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: A pop-up message is displayed: "Support for this device is no longer available." Tapping outside the pop-up dismisses it.
